description: A connector is pure data: it lines the columns of a common lease-administration / property-management export up with the commercial-leasing pack's fields. Rename the left side to match your export's headers.

value_hints.annual_rent: strip $ and commas — Aris reads money either way
value_hints.occupancy_pct: a number like 92.9, not the string '92.9%'
value_hints.Use Type: Office / Retail / Warehouse / Medical map straight through to space_type

note: No code here — a connector is a column-to-field map. Your rent roll never leaves your control except as the records you choose to load.
